parts.text: I want to completely remove the device protection plan from my account.
Please cancel my device protection and confirm
no
future charges.
I’d like to terminate my coverage under the device protection plan.
Can you remove all device protection services from my account?
I want to opt out of the protection plan I added for my phone.
Please help me cancel my device insurance policy.
I’d like to stop the device protection plan and confirm it has been removed.
Can you take my device off the protection plan entirely?
I want to cancel my device protection plan before the next billing cycle.
Please end the device protection service I have subscribed to.
I’d like to remove device insurance for my phone.
Can you terminate my device protection plan and stop billing me?
I want to get rid of the device protection coverage on my account.
Please cancel the protection plan attached to my device.
I’d like to opt out of device protection and ensure it is canceled completely.
Can you help me take my phone off the protection plan?
I want to discontinue my device protection plan and stop future payments.
Please remove the insurance coverage for my device from my account.
I’d like to end my device protection plan effective immediately.
Can you stop the protection service for my device?
I don’t need the device protection plan anymore and want it canceled.
Please opt me out of the device protection plan I’m currently enrolled in.
I want to terminate my device protection coverage.
Can you help me remove my device insurance from my account?
I’d like to cancel the device protection plan on my phone immediately.
